description_long: This is a modern urban helmet with a smooth, rounded shell finished in a speckled blue color. The helmet features a prominent black full-face visor that wraps around the front, providing extensive facial coverage and protection. There are two elongated ventilation slits on the upper front, allowing airflow into the helmet, and a visible chin strap with a quick-release buckle for secure fastening. The sides of the helmet display a dynamic white and gray abstract graphic design, adding a sporty and contemporary touch. The rear of the helmet is plain, with the blue speckled finish continuing uninterrupted, and a small circular vent or button detail is visible near the base.
description: A blue speckled urban helmet with a full-face black visor, abstract white and gray side graphics, and front ventilation slits.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the smooth blue speckled shell and two upper ventilation slits, with the chin strap visible below.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black full-face visor, abstract white and gray side graphics, and the chin strap with buckle.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large black visor, two upper ventilation slits, and the helmet's contoured shape.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the continuation of the abstract graphics, the visor, and a small circular vent or button near the base.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two elongated horizontal vents on the upper front, evenly spaced and slightly curved.
attribute_graphic_design: Abstract white and gray geometric graphics on the sides over a blue speckled base.
